text.message: Ya idk why red did that

would steal from black if they had cards
Blue ill do 1:1 on my turn
Otherwise im just helping you for no reason
lol no, was just showing that i had so many wheat
woudnt it be nice to settle
we gotta delay that wood port as long as possible
it's a close game, there is no obvious steal
see blue, you're back with good port
tbf ill just leave it there now
you can go ahead and move it
cant let oj get a city aswell tbf
I need the 10 roll 3 times bro
we can slow red down for now it think
i need to get some pacing

thought the gamw would be closer
anyway, ya'll are a fun bunch :)
